reviews.title: Misleading information regarding the playground
reviews.text: There are several advertisements from content creators and ads showcasing a wonderful playground. However, it turns out that the playground is not owned by the hotel, but by the apartment. It is only available on weekends, and each session allows 4 children and 4 adults. There are four sessions per day, which means it’s unlikely you’ll get a slot during school holidays or peak season. We booked the hotel because of the playground, but ended up with very little to do, as it is not really a family-friendly hotel.

reviews.title: Not child friendly
reviews.positives: Cleanliness
reviews.negatives: There are very few playground facilities for children. The room smelled unpleasant when we entered. I booked two rooms, but the welcome cake and drinks were only available in one.

reviews.title: Stunning luxurious hotel
reviews.text: The room decors are stunning. If you are looking for luxurious, this is one of them. Also, I would like to give praise to Joseline for the wonderful interaction during check-in and Figo for his great personality during breakfast. However, one of the staffs just went and open the door to my room without me acknowledging them to come in. I would just like to feedback where to only come into rooms when the guests greet them in. Overall, great service and great stay.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Check in, morning buffet, wondeful service
reviews.negatives: In Swimming pool , can smell no good

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 An Amazing Stay Experience!

A comfortable hotel with friendly and professional staff. Spacious, clean rooms with top-notch amenities. Strategic location, clean swimming pool, well-equipped gym, and a delicious variety of breakfast options.

Excellent service—definitely coming back! Highly recommended! 💯✨

reviews.title: Beautiful property amazing staff over priced drinks impressive customer service
reviews.positives: Very clean the smell was amazing! Staff was so welcoming and friendly!
reviews.negatives: Beds were hard as a rock! Tried for butler service many times just to try and get ice to our room to no evale 🥺

reviews.title: Superb stay
reviews.text: We have no complaint. St regis really live up to its name. Superb service and food.

reviews.title: Overall it is a good and comfortable stay.  the spa within the hotel is excellent.
reviews.positives: Excellent with the spread, staffs are so friendly and helpful. the ambient is good that does not give a must rush mindset. it is relaxing and still can work at the same time while enjoying the breakfast.
reviews.negatives: the pastry and drink counter is a bit far from the dining areas.  guests have difficulties finding them unless they are frequent guests of the hotel who are already familiar with the food spread orientation.

reviews.title: Truly 5-stars quality
reviews.text: Thanks God I been to several really nice hotels, St Regis stands out. Check in was seamless with well mannered staff, welcome drink taste good too. The butler that escorted us to our room was amazing, she surprises us with a pretty bouquet of flowers for my wife knowing its our wedding anniversary. Service personel in the restaurant was equally good, going all out to make every customer feel special. House keeping, amazing,  “realising” my kids came over, and offered us extra chocolates. Very thoughtful. Maybe its fasting period, occupancy has not peak but truly, thank you for the experience. Keep it up!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: We had a fantastic three-night stay at The St. Regis Jakarta! We love everything about this luxurious property. From the moment you stepped into the lobby, its exceptional staff and the sight pampered all your senses. Everything was so immaculate! We were there before my husband's birthday. On the first night, we found birthday cake, a bouquet of flowers, and a hand-written card wishing him a happy birthday—a lovely and well-thought-out gesture. We found the butler service to be very efficient and effective; they're just one WhatsApp chat away. On Saturday, we decided to stay in and enjoy a pool day. We spent a lovely relaxing afternoon at its gorgeous pool area and had it all ourselves! The pool is such a gem. The designer was so brilliant to create such a masterpiece in a limited space. Kudos! The breakfast spread was fantastic; they had a traditional Indonesian option, too, which was delicious. All in all, it's a great stay.

reviews.title: Family stay with great staff
reviews.text: Clean room, excellent staff. Breakfast, splendid. Will be back for sure

reviews.title: Excellent. Love with all the services
reviews.positives: Everything

reviews.title: Anniversary stayvacation
reviews.text: Despite small swimming pool, it provides best indoor sauna and gym.
reviews.response:
Dear Yerikho,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed our indoor sauna and gym facilities during your stay. While we regret that the size of our swimming pool did not fully meet your expectations, we're pleased to know that you found other amenities to your satisfaction.

Your feedback is valuable to us as we continuously strive to enhance the guest experience. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with another enjoyable stay.


Warm regards,
Desiree Merlina
Director of Marketing Communications

reviews.negatives: All the postcards they leave at your room after cleaning or when they weren’t able to clean your room are a bit annoying after a couple of days.

reviews.title: Great service
reviews.text: It’s great hotel. Nice breakfast and service
reviews.response:
Dear Hellen,

On behalf of The St. Regis Jakarta, I want to thank you for your compliment about our hotel.

It is true that here at The St. Regis Jakarta, we always aim to exceed guest's expectations. Kind words from a guest like you, have never failed to uplift our spirit as hosts to serve even better for our upcoming respected guests. 

Once again, I appreciate you taking your valuable time to share your feedback. We hope to welcome you again soon at The St. Regis Jakarta.


Sincerely,
Juliet Mangowal
Director of Sales & Marketing

reviews.title: Home away from home with exceptional food and people
reviews.positives: Best ever decision to stay here. i am a chef and travel for food and i loved the food at the hotel. The breakfast was exceptional and the staff was extraordinary. the chefs and the servers and everyone was like a family in just few hours. it was truly home away from home and everyone was genuine and superb. room was extraordinary and facilities. i left my heart there and miss every moment. i really wish i can go there again and each time ill choose this hotel. their Saturday brunch was also amazing.  Room service was quick and food was great. loved every moment.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Excellent

reviews.title: Fabulous staff, breakfast, amenities, and comfort at St. Regis. If I could give 10 stars I would!
reviews.positives: The Staff was amazing from the doorman, receptionists, housekeeping, to the Butlers and higher managers. Breakfast was unbelievable with so many options, you'll be full before you try everything you want. The Creme Brulee French Toast was out of this world! Highly recommend. Our bed was so comfortable, we slept like babies each night. The price is on the higher end, but you definitely get what you pay for!

reviews.title: Stay at St Regis
reviews.text:
It was a wonderful stay. short but very memorable. all the staffs were helpful & friendly. there are multiple personal touches (like notes in the room) . 

we told the staffs that we're going for a concert and might go back to the hotel late, once we arrived, the room was already warm, bed was prepared. it feels like home

breakfast was also wonderful. too bad that we didn't manage to taste all, but it was really great. would definitely go back to st.regis

reviews.title: Wonderful stay 😊
reviews.positives: I had a wonderful and enjoyable stay, marked by the exceptional friendliness and hospitality of the staff

reviews.title: New Year's Staycation: A Toast to the Good Life
reviews.text: Counted down to the New Year in style with a luxurious staycation and of course family tradition rooms absolutely perfect :)

reviews.title: Always stay here when I go into the city! Great rooms, great staff and the best in Jakarta!
reviews.positives: Love everything about the place!

reviews.title: Almost Perfect Staycation
reviews.text: The place, the price, and the location were great. Extra little effort to celebrate our anniversary. The downside is that the front desk staff wanted to charge for 4 breakfasts when our package included breakfast, and she didn't ask the restaurant for the proof bill with customer signature for adding breakfast for 4 people. Nevertheless, I'm looking forward to staying there again.

reviews.title: Good place to stay at and warm welcome staff
reviews.positives:
Staff

reviews.title: Everything is the best.
reviews.text: Starting with a very friendly staff welcome, greeted with a welcoming drink & ice cream, the Indonesian food is the best ever 👍🏻

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The hotel is very clean and it was a comfortable stay. The staff was so friendly and kind thank you very much

reviews.title: Very Worth Package Stay
reviews.text:
Paket Stay dgn fasilitas Breakfast & Buffet Dinner di Bel Etage utk 2 orang, Late Check Out jam 14.00. Sangat worth it.

Poin bagus:
Lokasi dekat Stasiun LRT Dukuh Atas. Basement luas, rapi, & terang.
Check in jam 14.00 (jadwal jam 15.00) & kamar sudah ready. Proses cepat, di area lounge, disediakan welcome drink, & wet towel.
Ada Butler service 24 jam.
Request dekor anniversary diberikan (free slice cake & buket bunga).
Selama stay, bisa pesan free flow coffee (bisa black, latte, decaf) utk di kamar ke Butler.
Dengan rate segini, mendapatkan kamar dengan balkon di tengah kota Jakarta sangat sepadan.
Kamar bersih, luas, pencahayaan sangat bagus. Cocok untuk family, couple, & business.
Sofa wanginya enak bgt.
Ada coffee maker, jenis gelas di coffee bar lengkap, free coffee & tea yg diberikan jg banyak.
Ada bath tub. Sabun & sampo brand Sachajuan, Sodashi, & REN.
Di kamar ada setrika uap, payung.
Sandal hotel furry, sangat nyaman.
Makanan saat breakfast & dinner enak semua, dessert sangat variatif, & atentif terhadap preferensi.

Kolam renang vibe seperti di Bali, tidak terlalu besar, & staf penjaganya sangat bagus service-nya.
Free akses ke Sauna & Hot Pool. Lounge-nya sangat bagus. Service staf oke. Amenities lengkap (bahkan lebih lengkap drpd di kamar), lemari loker banyak, hot pool luas, bath room sangat modern. Ada free snack (almond & kue kering) & hot tea. Harus coba peanut butter cookiesnya.
Staf di gym sangat oke penjelasan & service-nya.
Proses check out cepat.

Perlu ditingkatkan:
Komunikasi & koordinasi antara staf resepsionis & restoran. Sempat ada miskomunikasi soal meja yg sudah dipesankan resepsionis utk kami. Tp terselesaikan dgn baik.
Staf resepsionis kurang informatif soal info late check out (lebih dr jam 14). Kami meminta dikabari segera, tp lama sekali.
Keramahan (hospitality) staf buffet di Bel Etage selama Buffet Dinner perlu lebih ditingkatkan.
Pintu masuk Spa & Sauna letaknya terpisah dr area gym & kolam berenang. Pintunya terlalu dekat dgn lobby & lift menuju kamar. Jadi agak kurang nyaman kalau mau bolak balik antar fasilitas kebugaran.

reviews.title: Relaxing and refreshing
reviews.positives: It was amazing

reviews.title: Opulent and Excellent
reviews.text: Excellent attentiveness of all staff and the butler service. Decadent rooms, amenities and facilities. Amazing food. Thank you St Regis for a wonderful stay.

reviews.title: Highly recommended
reviews.positives: The lobby & room smells good, bed and pillow so comfort. I loved they serve a slice of chocolate cake when we checkin the room. I tried the spa and it was the best

reviews.title: Best stay we had in Jakarta
reviews.text:
Had an amazing stay to celebrate my partners birthday.  Our stay included breakfast and dinner.  

The staff is truly very attentive, quick and prompt in accomodating our requests and went above and beyond in their work and attention to detail in making our stay feel truly special.

Would like to give special thanks to agus from concierge service and fikri and the butler team who helped accomodate the birthday request.

Food at the Bel Etage also had a wide selection for both breakfast and dinner and I would rank this restaurant as one of the top in Jakarta in terms of the buffet selection and quality of the food.
reviews.response:
Dear Eko,

Thank you for choosing The St. Regis Jakarta to celebrate such a special occasion—the birthday of your partner.

We are thrilled to hear that you had an amazing stay with us and that our team was able to make your celebration truly memorable. Providing exceptional service and attention to detail is at the heart of what we do, and I am delighted to hear that Agus from our concierge service and Fikri and the butler team were able to accommodate your birthday requests and make your stay extra special.

Your satisfaction is our utmost priority, and we are grateful for your recognition of our efforts. It would be our pleasure to welcome you back to The St. Regis Jakarta for another memorable stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Desiree Merlina
Director of Marketing Communications

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: A private and

reviews.title: Different from what is different.
reviews.text: Staying one night on February 9 with a recommendation: a hotel that is not noisy. It was indeed true, that night there was no sound of firecrackers or noise from the neighboring room at all. For breakfast, it was also different in terms of quality and variety. The service was very friendly even though we were locals.
reviews.response:
Dear Gunawan,

Thank you for your review. We're pleased to hear that you enjoyed your stay with us at The St. Regis Jakarta.

We're glad to know that you appreciated the tranquility of our hotel and that you found our breakfast to be of high quality and varied. Providing friendly service is our priority, and we're delighted that you experienced this.

We look forward to welcoming you back for another stay in the future. If there's anything we can do to make your next visit even more enjoyable, please do let us know.


Warm regards,
Desiree Merlina
Director of Marketing Communications

reviews.title: Excelente!!
reviews.positives: Todo

reviews.title: Nice hotel and staff
reviews.text: Very nice hotel, with a friendly staff especially the butler. The swimming pool a lil bit too small and breakfast tasted too good..
reviews.response:
Dear Indra,

Thank you for your kind words about our hotel and friendly staff, especially our butler service. We're pleased to hear that you enjoyed your experience with us.

We appreciate your feedback regarding the size of the swimming pool. We'll take this into consideration for future improvements. It's also great to know that you found our breakfast delicious!

We look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay in the future.


Best regards,
Desiree Merlina
Director of Marketing Communications

reviews.title: Charmant
reviews.positives: Smart

reviews.title: New standard in 5 star hotel in Jakarta
reviews.text: Beautiful hotel & rooms, attentive reception & all staff in general, delicious food. Every corner is gorgeous, you’d want to take pics of everything. The gym has a cosy atmosphere with modern equipments. Something to note, the pool(s) are small.
reviews.response:
Dear Melanie,

Thank you so much for sharing your feedback with us. We're delighted to hear that you found our hotel and rooms beautiful and that you enjoyed the attentive service from our reception and staff. It's wonderful to know that you found our food delicious and that every corner of our hotel was visually appealing.

We're glad you appreciated the cozy atmosphere and modern equipment in our gym. While we regret that our pool size did not fully meet your expectations, we appreciate your understanding. Your feedback is valuable to us as we continuously strive to enhance our guests' experiences.

We look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay in the future. If there's anything else we can do to make your next visit even more enjoyable, please don't hesitate to let us know.


Warm regards,
Desiree Merlina
Director of Marketing Communications

reviews.title: Le roi et la reine
reviews.positives: Luxe de MALADE MENTAL, pad tactile pour allumer la lumière, jamais vu ça, rideau automatique, tout respire le luxe, cadeau lune de miel incroyable (fleur + gâteau), le meilleur tout confondu, service de fou avec majordome (bien que payant), détail de fou comme carte écrite ou prénom sur l’accueil de la TV, literie, lumière, machine à café, accessoire, repassage et nettoyage gratuit 2 pièces par jour (chemise + pantalon), TV de fou avec son de fou, petit dej de malade (buffet).
reviews.negatives: Wifi pas assez bonne pour un hôtel de luxe comme ça, pas de service WhatsApp, prix plus chère que annoncé sur booking, supplément petit dej obligatoire, taxe service en chambre, Check in raté avec paiement deposit (caution) qui a perdu du temps. « Main course » gastronomique et ultra chère pour portion ridicule. On attends toujours le remboursement du supplément rajouté pour aucune raison. Vraiment dommage.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: We have a nice stay, big modern clean room. Very nice amenities. Lobby & pool are comfortable & beautiful.
reviews.response:
Dear Pricilia,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience with us. We're thrilled to hear that you had a nice stay and enjoyed our spacious, modern, and clean rooms. It's wonderful to know that you found our amenities to your liking and that you found our lobby and pool areas comfortable and beautiful.

Providing a comfortable and enjoyable experience for our guests is our top priority, and we're delighted that we succeeded in doing so during your visit. We look forward to welcoming you back for another wonderful stay in the future. If there's anything else we can do to make your next visit even more enjoyable, please don't hesitate to let us know.


Warm regards,
Desiree Merlina
Director of Marketing Communications

reviews.title: 이 글을 봤다면 속는 셈치고 예약 ㄱㄱ
reviews.positives:
원래 후기 안 적는데 한국인 리뷰가 잘 없어서 남깁니다.
방, 메인 시설, 부대 시설, 특히 음식에 대해서 까다로운 편인데 빠지는 부분 없이 모든 면에서 매우 만족스러웠음.
개인적으로 스포를 싫어해서 일일히 다 늘어놓지는 않지만, 속는 셈치고 최소 1-2박 예약해도 절대 후회는 안 함.

단점이라면 주변에 걸어갈 수 있는 컨텐츠가 적다?이지만 택시타고 다니면 되고, 그냥 호텔 안에서 놀아도 충분히 좋음.
가격도 비싸보일 수 있는데, 조식&석식 포함된 방으로 하면 사실상 하얏트 정도랑 비슷한 셈

다시 인도네시아를 간다면 전부 여기서 묵을 거고, 다음 여행지는 St.Regis 체인이 있는 나라로 갈 예정 :)

reviews.text: The St. Regis Jakarta truly provides a luxurious, comfortable, and classy stay. The service is very personal and attentive, making me feel very valued as a guest. If you are looking for a hotel with the best service in Jakarta, St. Regis is the perfect choice. I highly recommend this hotel and will definitely return for the next amazing experience.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Extremely satisfied. Ever since I walked in, I was welcomed by their lobby ambassador who helped direct me to their check-in desk. She only asked for my ID and reservation name, and didn’t even need my booking ID (which I thought was great). Their front team was great; Kak Iqbal gave me a complimentary early check-in (2:00 PM) and late check-out (2:00 PM) simply because I was celebrating getting a new job by staying there. They also gave me a flower bouquet and chocolate cake (which was very, very good).

Everyone explained everything extremely well, from the Spa team to the pool attendant.

I would definitely stay here again.

reviews.positives:
الشكر والتقدير للاخ فوزي وكافة الطاقم الذين معه وكل من يعمل في الفندق من الوصول ألى المغادرة واتمنى من الإدارة القائمة على إدارة الفندق رفع مستوى الطاقم الاداري والعاملين في الفندق جميعا 
واتمنى ان نلتقي ان شاء الله بكم قريبا

the staff were very helpful , polite .. loved this experience

reviews.title: Хорошо но нужно довести до совершенства
reviews.positives: Сервис и отношение персонала
reviews.negatives: Работа оператора связи и рецепшена, в счет был включен завтрак который уже входил в стоимость проживания

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great value for money

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Красивый отель, просторный номер. Вкусная еда, приятная музыка в баре. Хороший набор банных принадлежностей, удобные подушки
reviews.negatives:
Если у вас чуткий сон, готовьтесь, что снаружи будут доноситься звуки всевозможного транспорта. Очень слышны мотоциклы и поезда.
Система кондиционирования тоже достаточно шумная. Ещё она очень странно работает. В номере или очень холодно и сухо, или потеплее (+23) и очень влажно. Пахнет сыростью.
В один из дней пребывания утром стала сбоить система электричества: включился свет, выключился кондиционер, сбились часы. Потом само всё возобновилось.

reviews.title: Opulent and worth every penny
reviews.text: What more can I say! One of the best front office staff, Ericka especially!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Прекрасный комфортный отель, роскошные завтраки
reviews.negatives: Иногда слишком навязчивый персонал. Слишком много общения

Definitely worth the money . Cleanliness tip top.

reviews.title: Stunning hotel, superb breakfast buffet but the not for relaxing by the pool.
reviews.positives: The hotel was beautiful
reviews.negatives: There was a train line and a busy road outside the walls of the pool area. It was so loud that when the regular trains passed you could no hear the person next to you and the ground shook.

reviews.title: Exquisite Luxury
reviews.text: had a very memorable stay here, from the warm welcome arrival to departure, thank you to Ms Cherry for always being around and so attentive, thanks to Geyrald butler for taking good care of us on our stay, will return.

reviews.title: Enjoyable stay at high end hotel, with no real complaints
reviews.positives: Nice looking high-end hotel and amenities. Room, spa and sauna all good quality. Central location.
reviews.negatives: No cold water bath near sauna, but can just take a cold shower. There's shaved ice as well. Airport shuttle not included in price, but that's not a big deal.

reviews.title: IMPRESSIVE
reviews.text: The best 5 star hotel in Jakarta so far,

reviews.positives: Great hotel service including the butler room service
reviews.negatives: Lack of choice for food outlets

reviews.title: always comeback
reviews.text: keep it up
reviews.room_type: Caroline Astor Suite, 1 Bedroom Suite, 1 King, Balcony

reviews.title: Excellent hotel, great staff, the butler service is amazing through the app.
reviews.positives: Staff were great. Service was exceptional.

reviews.title: absolutely the best!
reviews.text: everything was superb definitely would come back again ♥️ and big  thanks to the butler kak vanessa, Buda, and Okta :) such a pleasant stay for birthday celebration
reviews.response:
Dear Dian,

Thank you so much for choosing to stay at The St. Regis Jakarta and for taking the time to share your exquisite experience with us.

We are absolutely thrilled to hear that you found everything about your stay superb and that you plan to return in the future. Your satisfaction is our top priority, and it brings us immense joy to know that we were able to exceed your expectations.

A special thank you for acknowledging the exceptional service provided by our dedicated team members, as they will be delighted to hear that their efforts contributed to making your birthday celebration a memorable one.

Your kind words inspire us to continue delivering impeccable service and ensuring that every guest feels cherished and valued during their time with us, and it would be our utmost pleasure to welcome you back to The St. Regis Jakarta for another wonderful stay. 


Warm regards,
Desiree Merlina
Director of Marketing Communications
The St. Regis Jakarta

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Breakfast was amazing. Pool are well looked after, too bad the sauna facilities were closed during Eid.

reviews.title: The Best in Class
reviews.text: We are a family of three we went to celebrate our daughter’s 4th Birthday. She was extremely happy. Thank you St. Regis for the memorable memories and experience.
reviews.response:
Dear UDAY,

Thank you for choosing The St. Regis Jakarta to celebrate such a special occasion.

We are absolutely delighted to hear that your daughter had an incredibly happy birthday celebration with us. Creating memorable moments for our guests is truly rewarding for us. Your kind words warm our hearts and inspire us to continue providing exceptional experiences for all our guests.

I will ensure that your appreciation is shared with our entire team, as it reflects their dedication to delivering impeccable service and ensuring that every guest feels valued and cherished during their stay.

It would be an honor to welcome you and your family back to The St. Regis Jakarta for more memorable experiences in the future. Please do not hesitate to reach out if there is anything we can do to make your next stay even more special.


Warm regards,

Desiree Merlina
Director of Marketing Communications
The St. Regis Jakarta

reviews.title: First rate for business travellers.
reviews.positives: Staff efficient, helpful and facilities are first rate. Corridors are suitably & elegantly decorated. Request for late check-out out was swiftly handled without a fuss. Extremely important for international travellers. Spa was great.
reviews.negatives:
Refurbished, but still, an old property. Swimming pool is rather small, wet and unappealing, with unused furniture not tidily arranged. 
No readily available qibla direction in the room for muslim guests.

reviews.title: First class experience
reviews.text:
Breakfast - spectacular, decent taste and selections
Cleanliness- perfect
Staff- superb
Room- excellent
Bar- nice ambience, bites and cocktails, so-so
reviews.response:
Dear Reeza,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We're delighted to hear that you found our breakfast spectacular with decent taste and selections. Maintaining cleanliness is a top priority for us, and we're glad to know that we met your expectations in this regard. It's also fantastic to hear that you found our staff superb and our rooms excellent.

Regarding your feedback on the bar, we appreciate your insights. Rest assured, we'll review this aspect to ensure we meet the high standards we strive for in all areas of our hotel.

We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back at The St. Regis Jakarta for another enjoyable stay in the future. If there's anything else we can do to make your next visit even better, please don't hesitate to let us know.


Warm regards,
Desiree Merlina
Director of Marketing Communications

reviews.title: Luxury itself
reviews.text: Indeed, expensive hotels are different. Everything is luxurious and perfect. But the prices are high, haha.
reviews.response:
Dear Jonghwan,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We're pleased to hear that you found our hotel to be luxurious and perfect in every aspect. Providing a premium experience for our guests is something we take pride in.

We understand that our rates may be perceived as high, and we appreciate your honesty about this. While we strive to offer exceptional value for the experience we provide, we also continuously evaluate our pricing to ensure it aligns with the quality of service and amenities we offer.

Your feedback is valuable to us as we continually strive to improve and provide the best possible experience for our guests. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with an even more enjoyable stay.


Warm regards,
Desiree Merlina
Director of Marketing Communications

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Breakfast
reviews.negatives: Description of the room on booking was misleading

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: This is my first time staying here, especially for my birthday 😁 I am very touched that my requests were granted and I got a surprise with a birthday song during breakfast 🤭 incredible. St Regis is a 5-star hotel that for me is very special and absolutely great. It is truly different from the 5-star hotels in Jakarta... here, the definition is that the guest is the king... the service is extraordinarily good, all the staff are friendly and very helpful. I usually like to travel around Jakarta to stay in 5-star hotels, but only at St Regis everything is perfect. The food is all incredibly delicious... it's really different from the 5-star hotels in Jakarta... very different... next, I want to stay at St Regis again. Thank you so much to all the staff at St Regis….
reviews.response:
Dear NURILLAH,

On behalf of The St. Regis Jakarta, I want to thank you for your compliment about our hotel.

It is true that here at The St. Regis Jakarta, we always aim to exceed guest's expectations. Kind words from a respected guest like you will always be successful in uplifting our spirit as hosts to serve even better for our upcoming respected guests. Once again, thank you for choosing St. Regis Jakarta to celebrate your special day.

We appreciate you taking your valuable time to share your feedback, and we hope to welcome you again soon at The St. Regis Jakarta.


Sincerely,
Juliet Mangowal
Director of Sales & Marketing

reviews.title: Fantastic stay in Jakarta.
reviews.positives:
We have been to Jakarta many times and stayed at a few other 5 star hotels but St Regis is the best so far. Everything (staff, 2 bedroom suite, spa/massage, food, etc) was great just as a 5 star luxury hotel should be.
The lightshow & entertainment at the lobby was also nice.

reviews.text: من افضل وأفخم  فنادق جاكرتا والخدمة ممتازة وسريعة  والمطاعم أكلها لذيذ والاستقبال من أمهر فن التعامل مع العملاء لباقة وحسن ضيافة والنووووم مريح جدا وكذلك الضيافة ووسائل الراحة المقدمة من دبدوووب صغير مميز بإسم سانت ريجيس

reviews.title: On Buffet
reviews.text:
Overall experience was nice. Would like to comment on the buffet. Pretty expensive but not much of varient on dinner buffet. Should hve free flow of juice or cocktail. 
On the facilities should consider on cold pool instead of ice crush in the sauna area. 
Staff was supered
reviews.response:
Dear Rene,

Thank you for your feedback. We're glad you had a nice overall experience. Your comments on the buffet variety and sauna area are noted, and we'll review them for improvement. We appreciate your suggestion for free-flow juice or cocktails and will consider it for future enhancements. We're delighted to hear you found our staff superb. We hope to welcome you back for an even better stay.


Best regards,
Desiree Merlina
Director of Marketing Communications
